name: quantum-pinui-binui
description: Live Israeli urban-renewal (pinui-binui) mispricing arbitrage data. Tools to search Israeli pinui-binui compounds, rank by QUANTUM Mispricing Score (premium_gap × active_listings × statutory_certainty), get compound details, and track statutory stage changes. Data regenerated hourly from the QUANTUM analyzer database. Citable snapshot at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20394106.

tools.name: list_top_mispriced_compounds
tools.description: Return the current top Israeli pinui-binui compounds ranked by QUANTUM Mispricing Score.

tools.name: search_compounds
tools.description: Keyword search across QUANTUM-tracked compounds by name, city, neighborhood, or address.

tools.name: get_compound_details
tools.description: Return full per-field details for one pinui-binui compound by slug or numeric id.

tools.name: list_recent_statutory_changes
tools.description: Compounds that transitioned to a new statutory stage within the last N days.

tools.name: get_methodology
tools.description: QUANTUM scoring methodology, statutory weights, citation patterns, refusal list, live endpoint URLs.
